mapper.select: SELECT totals.*, totals.subject_confirmed_workload + totals.paper_confirmed_workload + totals.monograph_confirmed_workload + totals.award_confirmed_workload + totals.patent_confirmed_workload + totals.software_confirmed_workload AS total_workload FROM ( SELECT #{userId} AS user_id, COALESCE(MAX(detail.user_name), '') AS user_name, #{year} AS `year`, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN detail.module_name = 'subject' THEN detail.workload ELSE 0 END), 0) AS subject_estimated_workload, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN detail.module_name = 'subject' AND detail.status = '已通过' THEN detail.workload ELSE 0 END), 0) AS subject_confirmed_workload, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN detail.module_name = 'paper' THEN detail.workload ELSE 0 END), 0) AS paper_estimated_workload, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN detail.module_name = 'paper' AND detail.status = '已通过' THEN detail.workload ELSE 0 END), 0) AS paper_confirmed_workload, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN detail.module_name = 'monograph' THEN detail.workload ELSE 0 END), 0) AS monograph_estimated_workload, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN detail.module_name = 'monograph' AND detail.status = '已通过' THEN detail.workload ELSE 0 END), 0) AS monograph_confirmed_workload, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN detail.module_name = 'award' THEN detail.workload ELSE 0 END), 0) AS award_estimated_workload, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN detail.module_name = 'award' AND detail.status = '已通过' THEN detail.workload ELSE 0 END), 0) AS award_confirmed_workload, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN detail.module_name = 'patent' THEN detail.workload ELSE 0 END), 0) AS patent_estimated_workload, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN detail.module_name = 'patent' AND detail.status = '已通过' THEN detail.workload ELSE 0 END), 0) AS patent_confirmed_workload, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN detail.module_name = 'software' THEN detail.workload ELSE 0 END), 0) AS software_estimated_workload, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN detail.module_name = 'software' AND detail.status = '已通过' THEN detail.workload ELSE 0 END), 0) AS software_confirmed_workload FROM ( SELECT user_name, COALESCE(workload, 0) AS workload, status, 'subject' AS module_name FROM research_subject WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND (`year` = #{year} OR `year` LIKE CONCAT(#{year}, '-%') OR `year` LIKE CONCAT(#{year}, '/%')) UNION ALL SELECT user_name, COALESCE(workload, 0), status, 'paper' FROM research_paper WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND (`year` = #{year} OR `year` LIKE CONCAT(#{year}, '-%') OR `year` LIKE CONCAT(#{year}, '/%')) UNION ALL SELECT user_name, COALESCE(workload, 0), status, 'monograph' FROM research_monograph WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND (`year` = #{year} OR `year` LIKE CONCAT(#{year}, '-%') OR `year` LIKE CONCAT(#{year}, '/%')) UNION ALL SELECT user_name, COALESCE(workload, 0), status, 'award' FROM research_award WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND (`year` = #{year} OR `year` LIKE CONCAT(#{year}, '-%') OR `year` LIKE CONCAT(#{year}, '/%')) UNION ALL SELECT user_name, COALESCE(workload, 0), status, 'patent' FROM research_patent WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND (`year` = #{year} OR `year` LIKE CONCAT(#{year}, '-%') OR `year` LIKE CONCAT(#{year}, '/%')) UNION ALL SELECT user_name, COALESCE(workload, 0), status, 'software' FROM research_software WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND (`year` = #{year} OR `year` LIKE CONCAT(#{year}, '-%') OR `year` LIKE CONCAT(#{year}, '/%')) ) detail HAVING COUNT(*) > 0 ) totals

SELECT totals.*, totals.theory_course_confirmed_workload + totals.experiment_course_confirmed_workload + totals.practical_teaching_confirmed_workload + totals.thesis_course_confirmed_workload + totals.science_innovation_confirmed_workload + totals.competition_confirmed_workload + totals.textbook_confirmed_workload + totals.education_reform_confirmed_workload + totals.education_reform_paper_confirmed_workload + totals.proctor_confirmed_workload + totals.graduate_theory_course_confirmed_workload + totals.graduate_guide_student_confirmed_workload AS total_workload FROM ( SELECT #{userId} AS user_id, COALESCE(MAX(detail.user_name), '') AS user_name, #{year} AS `year`, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN detail.module_name = 'theory_course' THEN detail.workload ELSE 0 END), 0) AS theory_course_estimated_workload, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN detail.module_name = 'theory_course' AND detail.status = '已通过' THEN detail.workload ELSE 0 END), 0) AS theory_course_confirmed_workload, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN detail.module_name = 'experiment_course' THEN detail.workload ELSE 0 END), 0) AS experiment_course_estimated_workload, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN detail.module_name = 'experiment_course' AND detail.status = '已通过' THEN detail.workload ELSE 0 END), 0) AS experiment_course_confirmed_workload, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN detail.module_name = 'practical_teaching' THEN detail.workload ELSE 0 END), 0) AS practical_teaching_estimated_workload, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN detail.module_name = 'practical_teaching' AND detail.status = '已通过' THEN detail.workload ELSE 0 END), 0) AS practical_teaching_confirmed_workload, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN detail.module_name = 'thesis_course' THEN detail.workload ELSE 0 END), 0) AS thesis_course_estimated_workload, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN detail.module_name = 'thesis_course' AND detail.status = '已通过' THEN detail.workload ELSE 0 END), 0) AS thesis_course_confirmed_workload, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN detail.module_name = 'science_innovation' THEN detail.workload ELSE 0 END), 0) AS science_innovation_estimated_workload, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN detail.module_name = 'science_innovation' AND detail.status = '已通过' THEN detail.workload ELSE 0 END), 0) AS science_innovation_confirmed_workload, LEAST(200, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN detail.module_name = 'competition' THEN detail.workload ELSE 0 END), 0)) AS competition_estimated_workload, LEAST(200, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN detail.module_name = 'competition' AND detail.status = '已通过' THEN detail.workload ELSE 0 END), 0)) AS competition_confirmed_workload, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN detail.module_name = 'textbook' THEN detail.workload ELSE 0 END), 0) AS textbook_estimated_workload, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN detail.module_name = 'textbook' AND detail.status = '已通过' THEN detail.workload ELSE 0 END), 0) AS textbook_confirmed_workload, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN detail.module_name = 'education_reform' THEN detail.workload ELSE 0 END), 0) AS education_reform_estimated_workload, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN detail.module_name = 'education_reform' AND detail.status = '已通过' THEN detail.workload ELSE 0 END), 0) AS education_reform_confirmed_workload, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN detail.module_name = 'education_reform_paper' THEN detail.workload ELSE 0 END), 0) AS education_reform_paper_estimated_workload, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN detail.module_name = 'education_reform_paper' AND detail.status = '已通过' THEN detail.workload ELSE 0 END), 0) AS education_reform_paper_confirmed_workload, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN detail.module_name = 'proctor' THEN detail.workload ELSE 0 END), 0) AS proctor_estimated_workload, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN detail.module_name = 'proctor' AND detail.status = '已通过' THEN detail.workload ELSE 0 END), 0) AS proctor_confirmed_workload, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN detail.module_name = 'graduate_theory_course' THEN detail.workload ELSE 0 END), 0) AS graduate_theory_course_estimated_workload, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN detail.module_name = 'graduate_theory_course' AND detail.status = '已通过' THEN detail.workload ELSE 0 END), 0) AS graduate_theory_course_confirmed_workload, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN detail.module_name = 'graduate_guide_student' THEN detail.workload ELSE 0 END), 0) AS graduate_guide_student_estimated_workload, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN detail.module_name = 'graduate_guide_student' AND detail.status = '已通过' THEN detail.workload ELSE 0 END), 0) AS graduate_guide_student_confirmed_workload FROM ( SELECT user_name, COALESCE(workload, 0) AS workload, status, 'theory_course' AS module_name FROM teaching_undergraduate_theory_course WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND `year` = #{year} UNION ALL SELECT user_name, COALESCE(workload, 0), status, 'experiment_course' FROM teaching_undergraduate_experiment_course WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND `year` = #{year} UNION ALL SELECT user_name, COALESCE(workload, 0), status, 'practical_teaching' FROM teaching_undergraduate_practice_course WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND `year` = #{year} UNION ALL SELECT user_name, COALESCE(workload, 0), status, 'thesis_course' FROM undergraduate_thesis_course WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND `year` = #{year} UNION ALL SELECT user_name, COALESCE(workload, 0), status, 'science_innovation' FROM teaching_science_innovation WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND `year` = #{year} UNION ALL SELECT user_name, COALESCE(workload, 0), status, 'competition' FROM teaching_competition WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND `year` = #{year} UNION ALL SELECT user_name, COALESCE(workload, 0), status, 'textbook' FROM teaching_textbook WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND `year` = #{year} UNION ALL SELECT user_name, COALESCE(workload, 0), status, 'education_reform' FROM teaching_education_reform WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND `year` = #{year} UNION ALL SELECT user_name, COALESCE(workload, 0), status, 'education_reform_paper' FROM teaching_education_reform_paper WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND `year` = #{year} UNION ALL SELECT user_name, COALESCE(workload, 0), status, 'proctor' FROM teaching_proctor WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND `year` = #{year} UNION ALL SELECT user_name, COALESCE(workload, 0), status, 'graduate_theory_course' FROM teaching_graduate_theory_course WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND `year` = #{year} UNION ALL SELECT user_name, COALESCE(workload, 0), status, 'graduate_guide_student' FROM teaching_graduate_guide_student WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND `year` = #{year} ) detail HAVING COUNT(*) > 0 ) totals
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO research_total_workload ( user_id, user_name, `year`, subject_estimated_workload, subject_confirmed_workload, paper_estimated_workload, paper_confirmed_workload, monograph_estimated_workload, monograph_confirmed_workload, award_estimated_workload, award_confirmed_workload, patent_estimated_workload, patent_confirmed_workload, software_estimated_workload, software_confirmed_workload, total_workload ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{userName}, #{year}, #{subjectEstimatedWorkload}, #{subjectConfirmedWorkload}, #{paperEstimatedWorkload}, #{paperConfirmedWorkload}, #{monographEstimatedWorkload}, #{monographConfirmedWorkload}, #{awardEstimatedWorkload}, #{awardConfirmedWorkload}, #{patentEstimatedWorkload}, #{patentConfirmedWorkload}, #{softwareEstimatedWorkload}, #{softwareConfirmedWorkload}, #{totalWorkload} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE user_name = VALUES(user_name), subject_estimated_workload = VALUES(subject_estimated_workload), subject_confirmed_workload = VALUES(subject_confirmed_workload), paper_estimated_workload = VALUES(paper_estimated_workload), paper_confirmed_workload = VALUES(paper_confirmed_workload), monograph_estimated_workload = VALUES(monograph_estimated_workload), monograph_confirmed_workload = VALUES(monograph_confirmed_workload), award_estimated_workload = VALUES(award_estimated_workload), award_confirmed_workload = VALUES(award_confirmed_workload), patent_estimated_workload = VALUES(patent_estimated_workload), patent_confirmed_workload = VALUES(patent_confirmed_workload), software_estimated_workload = VALUES(software_estimated_workload), software_confirmed_workload = VALUES(software_confirmed_workload), total_workload = VALUES(total_workload)

INSERT INTO teaching_total_workload ( user_id, user_name, `year`, theory_course_estimated_workload, theory_course_confirmed_workload, experiment_course_estimated_workload, experiment_course_confirmed_workload, practical_teaching_estimated_workload, practical_teaching_confirmed_workload, thesis_course_estimated_workload, thesis_course_confirmed_workload, science_innovation_estimated_workload, science_innovation_confirmed_workload, competition_estimated_workload, competition_confirmed_workload, textbook_estimated_workload, textbook_confirmed_workload, education_reform_estimated_workload, education_reform_confirmed_workload, education_reform_paper_estimated_workload, education_reform_paper_confirmed_workload, proctor_estimated_workload, proctor_confirmed_workload, graduate_theory_course_estimated_workload, graduate_theory_course_confirmed_workload, graduate_guide_student_estimated_workload, graduate_guide_student_confirmed_workload, total_workload ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{userName}, #{year}, #{theoryCourseEstimatedWorkload}, #{theoryCourseConfirmedWorkload}, #{experimentCourseEstimatedWorkload}, #{experimentCourseConfirmedWorkload}, #{practicalTeachingEstimatedWorkload}, #{practicalTeachingConfirmedWorkload}, #{thesisCourseEstimatedWorkload}, #{thesisCourseConfirmedWorkload}, #{scienceInnovationEstimatedWorkload}, #{scienceInnovationConfirmedWorkload}, #{competitionEstimatedWorkload}, #{competitionConfirmedWorkload}, #{textbookEstimatedWorkload}, #{textbookConfirmedWorkload}, #{educationReformEstimatedWorkload}, #{educationReformConfirmedWorkload}, #{educationReformPaperEstimatedWorkload}, #{educationReformPaperConfirmedWorkload}, #{proctorEstimatedWorkload}, #{proctorConfirmedWorkload}, #{graduateTheoryCourseEstimatedWorkload}, #{graduateTheoryCourseConfirmedWorkload}, #{graduateGuideStudentEstimatedWorkload}, #{graduateGuideStudentConfirmedWorkload}, #{totalWorkload} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE user_name = VALUES(user_name), theory_course_estimated_workload = VALUES(theory_course_estimated_workload), theory_course_confirmed_workload = VALUES(theory_course_confirmed_workload), experiment_course_estimated_workload = VALUES(experiment_course_estimated_workload), experiment_course_confirmed_workload = VALUES(experiment_course_confirmed_workload), practical_teaching_estimated_workload = VALUES(practical_teaching_estimated_workload), practical_teaching_confirmed_workload = VALUES(practical_teaching_confirmed_workload), thesis_course_estimated_workload = VALUES(thesis_course_estimated_workload), thesis_course_confirmed_workload = VALUES(thesis_course_confirmed_workload), science_innovation_estimated_workload = VALUES(science_innovation_estimated_workload), science_innovation_confirmed_workload = VALUES(science_innovation_confirmed_workload), competition_estimated_workload = VALUES(competition_estimated_workload), competition_confirmed_workload = VALUES(competition_confirmed_workload), textbook_estimated_workload = VALUES(textbook_estimated_workload), textbook_confirmed_workload = VALUES(textbook_confirmed_workload), education_reform_estimated_workload = VALUES(education_reform_estimated_workload), education_reform_confirmed_workload = VALUES(education_reform_confirmed_workload), education_reform_paper_estimated_workload = VALUES(education_reform_paper_estimated_workload), education_reform_paper_confirmed_workload = VALUES(education_reform_paper_confirmed_workload), proctor_estimated_workload = VALUES(proctor_estimated_workload), proctor_confirmed_workload = VALUES(proctor_confirmed_workload), graduate_theory_course_estimated_workload = VALUES(graduate_theory_course_estimated_workload), graduate_theory_course_confirmed_workload = VALUES(graduate_theory_course_confirmed_workload), graduate_guide_student_estimated_workload = VALUES(graduate_guide_student_estimated_workload), graduate_guide_student_confirmed_workload = VALUES(graduate_guide_student_confirmed_workload), total_workload = VALUES(total_workload)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM research_total_workload WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND `year` = #{year}
DELETE FROM teaching_total_workload WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND `year` = #{year}
